TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ya-mu-su-ke "Ba a kamu, Yamoussoukro, Ba a pangiha, (jamusuk Āo)" u angangan nu Syang-ya a dadipasan, tini i A-pi-sang saamkisan tu 240 kung-li a kitizaan, tademaw pakala tu 242744 ku tademaw. Ya-mu-su-ke a lala' tini i saamisan 6 tu 50 a saculil, satipan tu 5 tu 15 saculilan "6.8333,-5.25". sin-cen tungus nu Ya-mu-su-keay a tekeday a kitizaan. ťõÖÁ©ÜÁīĘśąą(ś≥ēŤ™ě:YamoussoukroÔľõś≥ēŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(jamusuk Āo)) . nilaculan likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ka-sien-ke "Kouassi N'Go" a sinawawa tu tatayna ci Ya-mu-su "Yamousso" tumuk i Ba-kow pidebungan a ziday mikuwanay tawya pangangan han En-ke-ke-low "N'Gokro" a Ya-mu-su-ke. tawyauyni niyazu'ay iza ku 475 ku tademaw, u A-kuy "Akou√©" a kitizaan 129 ku niyazu' Ś§łŤ•ŅśĀ©śąą(Kouassi N'Go)ÁöĄŚß™ÁĒ•Ťľ©Ś•≥śÄßťõÖÁ©ÜŤėá(Yamousso) (N'Gokro) (Akou√©) . kanahatu nu hekalay a way-cyaw atu pasiwbanay kacacayat mapatizeng tu, 1909 a m ihcaan, i pitudawa nu tumuk ci Cya-mu-la-pow "Djamlabo", Ya-ku-ye paculi tu Ba-kow a pikuwan a kawaw. tini i Pu-a-bu-lay "Bouafl√©" a zazanan, laed tu Ya-mu-su-ke 7 kung-li tu Pang-ci "Bonzi" ma tuduh tu, tizaay tapang nu Ba-kow ci Si-mung.mi-li-s "Simon Maurice" zayhan Kwa-si-en-ke tahkal amisakapah kya caay saybang. uyni kasikazan ayaw nu mikeliday ci Kwa-si-en-ke masungaan tu ku Ya-ku-ye a tademaw miales tuyni sisatebucay a ngangayaw. yu kapah tu ku kawaw atu panukas tatungus hawsa, ci Si-mung.mo-li saaca ci Pung-ce caay kataneng ku katalawan, paketun Ba-kow katukuhan nu hitay palimaden tayza i Ya-mu-su-ke, Ba-kow a sin-cen nu mikuwanay itiza tu patizeng tu pikiningan ci Kwa-si-en-ke a luma', satu sakay ci Ya-mu-suan a kasikaz, pasumad han ku ngangan ni En-ke-ke-lye ci Ya-mu-su-ke han "Yamoussoukro". Syang-ya tukus saayawsay a cungtung ci Bye-li-ke-s.U-bey-ay-bu-wa-ni i 1939 a mihcaan mala sunciw. tawya, Ya-mu-su-ke uyzaanay u adidi'ay nu malukay a niyazu', katukuh Syang-ya a tukusnamiteked malingatu tu misatabaki palahad. 1990 a mihcaan, Ya-mu-su-ke zikuz nu masasukapah hawsa m alepun tu patizeng tu pibaungan a luma', mala hizaay u tukay. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ja-mu-su-k…ô "ba a kamu, jamoussoukro, ba a paŇčińßa, (jamusuk*o)" u aŇčaŇčan nu sjaŇč-ja a dadipasan, tini i a-pi-saŇč saamkisan tu *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi a kitizaan, tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu ****** ku tad…ômaw. ja-mu-su-k…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tini i saamisan * tu ** a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, satipan tu * tu ** sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan "*.****,-*.**". sin- ¶…ôn tuŇčus nu ja-mu-su-k…ôaj a t…ôk…ôdaj a kitizaan. ****(**:jamoussoukro*****:(jamusuk*o)) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan r~…ĺikisi** ka-si…ôn-k…ô "kouassi n Ē~ °go" a sinawawa tu tatajna ¶i ja-mu-su "jamousso" tumuk i ba-kow pid…ôbuŇčan a zidaj mikuwanaj tawja paŇčaŇčan ńßan …ôn-k…ô-k…ô-r~…ĺow "n Ē~ °gokro" a ja-mu-su-k…ô. tawjaujni nijazu Ē~ °aj iza ku *** ku tad…ômaw, u a-kuj "akou*" a kitizaan *** ku nijazu Ē~ ° ****(kouassi n Ē~ °go)*********(jamousso) (n Ē~ °gokro) (akou*) . kanańßatu nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a waj- ¶jaw atu pasiwbanaj ka ¶a ¶ajat mapatiz…ôŇč tu, **** a m ińß ¶aan, i pitudawa nu tumuk ¶i ¶ja-mu-r~…ĺa-pow "djamr~…ĺabo", ja-ku-j…ô pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu ba-kow a pikuwan a kawaw. tini i pu-a-bu-r~…ĺaj "bouafr~…ĺ*" a zazanan, r~…ĺa…ôd tu ja-mu-su-k…ô * kuŇč-r~…ĺi tu paŇč- ¶i "bonzi" ma tuduńß tu, tizaaj tapaŇč nu ba-kow ¶i si-muŇč.mi-r~…ĺi-s "simon mauri ¶…ô" zajńßan kwa-si-…ôn-k…ô tańßkar~…ĺ amisakapańß kja ¶aaj sajbaŇč. ujni kasikazan ajaw nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i kwa-si-…ôn-k…ô masuŇčaan tu ku ja-ku-j…ô a tad…ômaw miar~…ĺ…ôs tujni sisat…ôbu ¶aj a ŇčaŇčajaw. ju kapańß tu ku kawaw atu panukas tatuŇčus ńßawsa, ¶i si-muŇč.mo-r~…ĺi saa ¶a ¶i puŇč- ¶…ô ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku katar~…ĺawan, pak…ôtun ba-kow katukuńßan nu ńßitaj par~…ĺimad…ôn tajza i ja-mu-su-k…ô, ba-kow a sin- ¶…ôn nu mikuwanaj itiza tu patiz…ôŇč tu pikiniŇčan ¶i kwa-si-…ôn-k…ô a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, satu sakaj ¶i ja-mu-suan a kasikaz, pasumad ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan ni …ôn-k…ô-k…ô-r~…ĺj…ô ¶i ja-mu-su-k…ô ńßan "jamoussoukro". sjaŇč-ja tukus saajawsaj a ¶uŇčtuŇč ¶i bj…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s.u-b…ô-aj-bu-wa-ni i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa sun ¶iw. tawja, ja-mu-su-k…ô ujzaanaj u adidi Ē~ °aj nu mar~…ĺukaj a nijazu Ē~ °, katukuńß sjaŇč-ja a tukusnamit…ôk…ôd mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu misatabaki par~…ĺańßad. **** a mińß ¶aan, ja-mu-su-k…ô zikuz nu masasukapańß ńßawsa m ar~…ĺ…ôpun tu patiz…ôŇč tu pibauŇčan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa ńßizaaj u tukaj. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ya-mu-su-ke "Ba a kamu, Yamoussoukro, Ba a pangiha, (jamusuk Āo)" u angangan nu Syang-ya a dadipasan, tini i A-pi-sang saamkisan tu 240 kung-li a kitizaan, tademaw pakala tu 242744 ku tademaw. Ya-mu-su-ke a lala' tini i saamisan 6 tu 50 a saculil, satipan tu 5 tu 15 saculilan "6.8333,-5.25". sin-cen tungus nu Ya-mu-su-keay a tekeday a kitizaan. ťõÖÁ©ÜÁīĘśąą(ś≥ēŤ™ě:YamoussoukroÔľõś≥ēŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(jamusuk Āo)) . nilaculan likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ka-sien-ke "Kouassi N'Go" a sinawawa tu tatayna ci Ya-mu-su "Yamousso" tumuk i Ba-kow pidebungan a ziday mikuwanay tawya pangangan han En-ke-ke-low "N'Gokro" a Ya-mu-su-ke. tawyauyni niyazu'ay iza ku 475 ku tademaw, u A-kuy "Akou√©" a kitizaan 129 ku niyazu' Ś§łŤ•ŅśĀ©śąą(Kouassi N'Go)ÁöĄŚß™ÁĒ•Ťľ©Ś•≥śÄßťõÖÁ©ÜŤėá(Yamousso) (N'Gokro) (Akou√©) . kanahatu nu hekalay a way-cyaw atu pasiwbanay kacacayat mapatizeng tu, 1909 a m ihcaan, i pitudawa nu tumuk ci Cya-mu-la-pow "Djamlabo", Ya-ku-ye paculi tu Ba-kow a pikuwan a kawaw. tini i Pu-a-bu-lay "Bouafl√©" a zazanan, laed tu Ya-mu-su-ke 7 kung-li tu Pang-ci "Bonzi" ma tuduh tu, tizaay tapang nu Ba-kow ci Si-mung.mi-li-s "Simon Maurice" zayhan Kwa-si-en-ke tahkal amisakapah kya caay saybang. uyni kasikazan ayaw nu mikeliday ci Kwa-si-en-ke masungaan tu ku Ya-ku-ye a tademaw miales tuyni sisatebucay a ngangayaw. yu kapah tu ku kawaw atu panukas tatungus hawsa, ci Si-mung.mo-li saaca ci Pung-ce caay kataneng ku katalawan, paketun Ba-kow katukuhan nu hitay palimaden tayza i Ya-mu-su-ke, Ba-kow a sin-cen nu mikuwanay itiza tu patizeng tu pikiningan ci Kwa-si-en-ke a luma', satu sakay ci Ya-mu-suan a kasikaz, pasumad han ku ngangan ni En-ke-ke-lye ci Ya-mu-su-ke han "Yamoussoukro". Syang-ya tukus saayawsay a cungtung ci Bye-li-ke-s.U-bey-ay-bu-wa-ni i 1939 a mihcaan mala sunciw. tawya, Ya-mu-su-ke uyzaanay u adidi'ay nu malukay a niyazu', katukuh Syang-ya a tukusnamiteked malingatu tu misatabaki palahad. 1990 a mihcaan, Ya-mu-su-ke zikuz nu masasukapah hawsa m alepun tu patizeng tu pibaungan a luma', mala hizaay u tukay. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

pakar~…ĺa tu ****** ku tad…ômaw. ja-mu-su-k…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tini i saamisan * tu ** a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, satipan tu * tu ** sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan "*.****,-*.**". sin- ¶…ôn tuŇčus nu ja-mu-su-k…ôaj a °go)*********(jamousso) (n Ē~ °gokro) (akou*) . kanańßatu nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a waj- ¶jaw atu pasiwbanaj ka ¶a ¶ajat mapatiz…ôŇč tu, **** a m ińß ¶aan, i pitudawa nu tumuk ¶i ¶ja-mu-r~…ĺa-pow "djamr~…ĺabo", ja-ku-j…ô pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu ba-kow a pikuwan a kawaw. tini i pu-a-bu-r~…ĺaj "bouafr~…ĺ*" a zazanan, r~…ĺa…ôd tu ja-mu-su-k…ô * kuŇč-r~…ĺi tu paŇč- ¶i "bonzi" ma tuduńß tu, tizaaj tapaŇč nu ba-kow ¶i si-muŇč.mi-r~…ĺi-s "simon mauri ¶…ô" zajńßan kwa-si-…ôn-k…ô tańßkar~…ĺ amisakapańß kja ¶aaj sajbaŇč. ujni kasikazan ajaw nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i kwa-si-…ôn-k…ô masuŇčaan tu ku ja-ku-j…ô a tad…ômaw miar~…ĺ…ôs tujni sisat…ôbu ¶aj a ŇčaŇčajaw. ju kapańß tu ku kawaw atu panukas tatuŇčus ńßawsa, ¶i si-muŇč.mo-r~…ĺi saa ¶a ¶i puŇč- ¶…ô ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku katar~…ĺawan, pak…ôtun ba-kow katukuńßan nu ńßitaj par~…ĺimad…ôn tajza i ja-mu-su-k…ô, ba-kow a sin- ¶…ôn nu mikuwanaj itiza tu patiz…ôŇč tu pikiniŇčan ¶i kwa-si-…ôn-k…ô a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, satu sakaj ¶i ja-mu-suan a kasikaz, pasumad ja-mu-su-k…ô ujzaanaj u adidi Ē~ °aj nu mar~…ĺukaj a nijazu Ē~ °, katukuńß sjaŇč-ja a tukusnamit…ôk…ôd mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu misatabaki par~…ĺańßad. **** a mińß ¶aan, ja-mu-su-k…ô zikuz nu masasukapańß ńßawsa m ar~…ĺ…ôpun tu patiz…ôŇč tu pibauŇčan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa ńßizaaj u tukaj. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
